coverage: 100% of reachable node types across the 54-group, 1,662-node closure.
validation: The authored bracket, compact-diameter, and half-screw cases have exact local bounds and visually aligned components. GN-VM retains split vertices and boolean faces, producing denser topology than Blender. Split-for-print remains partial: the browser adds 11.0895 units to the positive X bound.
